57094.title: The Kettering Incident : The Homecoming
57094.description: Anna wakes in the asylum with Dr McKenzie waiting for her, but she stealthily escapes while McKenzie is out of the room. Meanwhile, Dane finally hears Eliza calling from under the dam.
